title: City of Mirage
overview: Minami Kyoya aspires to join SI-VIS, a music group. But he gets caught up in a mysterious force, Mirage.

title: A Thoroughly Eaten Star
overview: Yosuke dies in the battle with the Mirage, and Kyoya is devastated. Soji tells him to go back to his hometown.

title: Welcome to Hellish Paradise
overview: Kyoya struggles to reach the other members’ level. When his debut stage is about to start, the Mirage appears.

title: New Team with a Rocky Road Ahead
overview: Despite everything, Kyoya leads a fulfilling school life. One day, Rui approaches Kyoya with a desperate plea.

title: The Day When Five Become One
overview: SI-VIS’s camp starts off awkward, but eventually, they start to open up. Then, Siren gives them a challenge.

title: Holding This Song and Courage in My Heart
overview: SI-VIS plans to counter the Mirage of unprecedented scale with the new album release concert.

title: Irrational Encounter
overview: Kyoya invites Nagi to the school festival while on a date. Then, we learn about June’s little brother.

title: Light and Darkness After the Festival
overview: Kyoya, μ, and Soji compete for points at the festival. Moved by June's voice, Krios questions his actions.

title: I Want to See Your Gentle Smile Again
overview: The Mirage has appeared in Saegusa Academy! But learning the identity of XENOS, June is consumed with hatred.

title: The Sixth SI-VIS
overview: Rui begins to train Nagi, but Kyoya is upset to learn that Nagi is slated to be a new SI-VIS member.

title: A Diva and a Knight
overview: SI-VIS goes to vacation on an island owned by Seina. There, Kyoya discovers texts that reminds him of Yosuke.

title: The Last Remaining Despair
overview: The Mirage appears in Kyoya's hometown, and Lukos' attack drives SI-VIS into a corner.

title: Dejection and Determination
overview: SI-VIS starts to train during Siren’s absence. Meanwhile, a mysterious figures watch over from afar.

title: Come Back to Life, My Friend
overview: Soji visits Kyoya in his hometown to bring him back. Meanwhile, Krios is fueled to avenge Lukos.

title: Because I Am SI-VIS
overview: The Mirage suddenly appears in Tokyo. Without Kyoya and Soji, SI-VIS counterattacks with a guerrilla concert.

title: Welcome to Labyrinth
overview: Kyoya tries to help Siren, and Nagi trains hard to step up. Then, a shocking secret is revealed in Harmonia.

title: Wishes and Songs Will Be Heard
overview: Nagi and μ are trapped in a mysterious labyrinth. Separated SI-VIS members fight hard for each other.

title: Bring Despair to the Earth, and…
overview: The most formidable enemy of all, Apollo, and SI-VIS commence the battle that will determine their fate.

title: Accelerating Collapse
overview: In the chaos, SI-VIS tries to regroup. Meanwhile, a major change is happening within XENOS.

title: Future After Revenge
overview: SI-VIS prepares to leave the Earth to take Nagi back. Meanwhile, Nagi learns about the diva.

title: Strongest Because of Imperfection
overview: Samael challenges SI-VIS to a battle over Nagi and the multiple Mirages on the earth.

title: A Diva in the Cage
overview: Apollo launches the final attack on the Earth using Nagi. Kyoya stands up to save her.

title: Triumphant Return of a Super Star
overview: SI-VIS faces Kokytos in the Mirage. With Siren back, the best performance in the history of SI-VIS begins!

title: Grand Finale of the Beginning
overview: The live concert that determines the fate of Earth will proceed to its encore.
